subcodes.first_line: O My handmaidens and My leaves! Upon you be My glory and My loving-kindness. The outward ascension of one of the chosen ones hath become the cause of inward ascension [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امائی و اوراقی علیکن بهائی و عنایتی صعود ظاهری یکی از اولیا سبب صعود باطنی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @prayer for the departed, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
